title: DEML-Aware BEST Router
author: Arturo R. Almaguer
prerequisite: R1 proved DEML is incomplete. R3 scope is: what does DEML add to BEST routing within its provable range?

updated_best_table.note: Only new/changed rows. All others unchanged.

reason_unchanged: DEML is incomplete for positive-exponent functions. EML/EDL/EXL remain optimal for those.
scope_note: The DEML dispatch table addition stays in the PRIVATE repo. The theorem (DEML is incomplete) is public. The routing optimization is private.
patent_note: This update extends the BEST routing algorithm. The dispatch table change is patent-candidate material — not to be published in the public blog.
